TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT PEDRO CATURAY'S DEMURRER TO SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION OF COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH TEN(10) DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR# 1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT PEDRO CATURAY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. MOVING PARTY FILED THEIR DEMURRER ON APRIL 26, 2005 ONLY FIVE(5) COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. PER CCP 1005(b), ALL MOVING PAPERS MUST BE FILED AND SERVED NO LATER THAN 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/JLW) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR#1558
